format.raw: <134>$DATE $TIME fortiedr-hostname CEF:0|Fortinet|FortiEDR|7.0.0|4105996|Security Event|10|cs1Label=Organization cs1=AcmeCorp cs2Label=OrganizationId cs2=1234 cs3Label=OS cs3=Windows 10 Pro cs4Label=ProcessPath cs4=C:\$ATTACK_NAME.exe cs5Label=DeviceState cs5=Running cs6Label=RawDataId cs6=789012 suser=$USER shost=$HOST fileHash=$FILE_HASH fname=$FILE_NAME app=$APP act=$ACTION dmac=$DST_MAC dst=SensitiveFile.txt deviceCustomDate1Label=FirstSeen deviceCustomDate1=$DATE cn1Label=Count cn1=5 msg=$ATTACK_NAME reason=Rule Sensitive File Access Attempt cs7Label=ProcessType cs7=64bit cs8Label=Classification cs8=Malicious

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="CEF" version="0" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0" name="device_version" />
    <Field position="1" name="msg" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="2" name="device_product" />
    <Field position="3" name="reason" />
    <Field position="4" name="Organization" />
    <Field position="5" name="dmac" />
    <Field position="6" name="dst" />
    <Field position="7" name="fileHash" />
    <Field position="8" name="OrganizationId" />
    <Field position="9" name="Count" />
    <Field position="10" name="deviceCustomDate2Label" />
    <Field position="11" name="signature_id" />
    <Field position="12" name="ProcessType" />
    <Field position="13" name="action" org_name="act" />
    <Field position="14" name="RawDataId" />
    <Field position="15" name="Classification" />
    <Field position="16" name="deviceCustomDate1Label" />
    <Field position="17" name="shost" />
    <Field position="18" name="severity" />
    <Field position="19" name="app" />
    <Field position="20" name="fname" />
    <Field position="21" name="attack_nm" />
    <Field position="22" name="OS" />
    <Field position="23" name="deviceCustomDate2" />
    <Field position="24" name="deviceCustomDate1" />
    <Field position="25" name="ProcessPath" />
    <Field position="26" name="cef_version" />
    <Field position="27" name="DeviceState" />
    <Field position="28" name="suser" />
    <Field position="29" name="device_vendor" />
    <Field position="30" name="Certificate" />
    <Field position="31" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('fortinet')]]" />
    <Field position="32" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="33" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="34" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="35" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_fortiedr_security_v1_cef')]]" />
    <Field position="36" name="model" convert_tag="[[@copy('device_product')]][[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="37" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('edr')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
